articles.title: Sanya E-Prix: Jake Dennis takes pole, Felipe Drugovich completes Andretti front-row lockout
articles.description: Andretti driver Jake Dennis took pole position in the Sanya E-Prix qualifying on Saturday. His teammate Felipe Drugovich joined him on the front row for the first time, giving Andretti a front-row lockout. However, it is set to be a fierce battle in Sanya, with Jaguar TCS Racing's Mitch Evans qualifying third, followed by Dan Ticktum in fourth.

The proposal took place at Prime and Pearl in Gainesville, Florida, the same restaurant where the couple shared their first date. Gillihan, a kindergarten teacher and mother of three, recently joined Lochte in creating a blended family of six children as the Olympic swimmer begins a coaching career in Missouri.

articles.title: Why Is USA Star Christian Pulisic Not Playing Against Australia? Coach Mauricio Pochettino Reveals Concern
articles.description: United States star Christian Pulisic missed the FIFA World Cup 2026 match against Australia because of a calf injury and was replaced in the starting lineup by Ricardo Pepi.

articles.title: Why Christian Pulisic is not playing USA's World Cup match vs Australia?
articles.description: U.S. star Christian Pulisic will miss Friday's World Cup match against Australia because of a calf injury and was replaced in the starting lineup by Ricardo Pepi. United States coach Mauricio Pochettino made the announcement during an interview with Fox about 90 minutes before the kickoff at Lumen Field in Seattle. On Thursday, Pochettino said Pulisic is in a "much better" spot than he was last Friday, and that he would be available for the Americans' next game against Turkey if he could not play against Australia. "Today, he was training in the morning in the camp and I've seen the feelings are good," Pochettino told Fox on Friday. "I hope as soon as possible he can be ready to be selected again and to be part of the team. Now, we need to be focused on our team and the players that are going to play." The move is a setback for a U.S. team that defeated Paraguay 4-1 in its opener on June 12 and with a win would clinch advancement to the round of 32. Pulisic left the game at halftim
